add-plain-text-to-pdf-page.title: Add Plain Text to a PDF Page Using TextFragment
add-plain-text-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, placing a plain text string at specific coordinates on the first page with a TextFragment, and saving the modified document.

insert-same-text-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert Same Text on All PDF Pages
insert-same-text-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, and add an identical plain‑text fragment to the page's Paragraphs collection.

load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory-stream.title: Load Custom TrueType Font from Memory Stream and Use in PDF
load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font from a memory stream, embedding it, and applying it to a TextFragment via TextState in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-otf-font-to-pdf.title: Apply Custom OTF Font to PDF TextFragment
apply-custom-otf-font-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an OTF font, embedding it, and applying it to a TextFragment to create styled text in a PDF document.

set-character-spacing-in-pdf.title: Set Character Spacing on a TextFragment
set-character-spacing-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to configure the TextState.CharacterSpacing property of a TextFragment to control inter‑character gaps before adding the fragment to a PDF page.

left-align-text-pdf.title: Left Align Text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
left-align-text-pdf.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and align it to the left margin by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Left.

center-text-horizontally-in-pdf.title: Center Text Horizontally in a PDF
center-text-horizontally-in-pdf.description: Shows how to center a TextFragment on a PDF page by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Center and then saving the document.

right-align-text-on-pdf-page.title: Right‑Align Text on a PDF Page
right-align-text-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

create-multi-line-text-paragraph.title: Create Multi‑Line Text Paragraph in PDF
create-multi-line-text-paragraph.description: Shows how to create a multi‑line TextParagraph, configure its rectangle, wrapping, alignment, margins, and add it to a PDF page using TextBuilder.

insert-hyperlink-into-pdf-text-segment.title: Insert Hyperlink into PDF Text Segment
insert-hyperlink-into-pdf-text-segment.description: Shows how to add a clickable hyperlink to a PDF by creating a TextSegment with a WebHyperlink, attaching it to a TextFragment, and placing it on a page.

add-styled-html-fragment-to-pdf-page.title: Add Styled HTML Fragment to PDF Page
add-styled-html-fragment-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create an HtmlFragment with inline CSS, optionally override its appearance using TextState, and insert it into a page's paragraph collection.

create-footnote-with-image.title: Create Footnote with Image in PDF
create-footnote-with-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a footnote to a PDF page and insert an image into the footnote's paragraph collection using Aspose.PDF.

add-footnote-with-table-to-pdf.title: Add Footnote with Table to PDF
add-footnote-with-table-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a 2×2 table inside a footnote and attach it to a text fragment in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-formatted-endnote.title: Insert Formatted Endnote with Bold and Italic Styles
insert-formatted-endnote.description: Shows how to add an endnote to a paragraph and apply bold and italic formatting using TextState in Aspose.Pdf.

inline-text-image-paragraph.title: Create Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
inline-text-image-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to combine a TextFragment and an Image within the same paragraph to produce an inline text‑image element in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.title: Add Invisible Tooltip Button Over Specific Text in PDF
add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.description: Shows how to locate a text fragment in a PDF and overlay an invisible button field that displays a tooltip on hover.

show-floating-box-on-button-hover.title: Show Floating Box on Button Hover Using HideAction
show-floating-box-on-button-hover.description: Demonstrates assigning a HideAction to a button's OnEnter and OnExit events to display and hide a floating text annotation when the mouse hovers over the button.

hide-floating-box-on-mouse-exit.title: Hide Floating Box on Mouse Exit Using ButtonField
hide-floating-box-on-mouse-exit.description: Shows how to create a hidden TextBoxField and a transparent ButtonField in a PDF, then assign a HideAction to the button's OnExit event to hide the floating box when the mouse leaves.

find-phrase-occurrences-pdf.title: Find and Locate Phrase Occurrences in PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber
find-phrase-occurrences-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber to search for a specific phrase in a PDF, retrieve each fragment's bounding box coordinates, and report the total occurrences.

replace-phrase-preserve-formatting.title: Replace Phrase While Preserving Formatting in PDF
replace-phrase-preserve-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to find a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with new text while keeping the original font, size, color, and other formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header to All PDF Pages
add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF document's pages and add a centered header text to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Footer to PDF
add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a footer containing page numbers on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi-transparent diagonal text watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextStamp and TextState.

rotate-text-in-pdf.title: Rotate Text in PDF Using TextState Rotation
rotate-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and rotate it by setting the TextState.Rotation property before placement.

apply-background-color-to-text.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
apply-background-color-to-text.description: Shows how to set a TextFragment's background color via its TextState before adding the fragment to a PDF page.

style-textfragment-font-size-color.title: Style TextFragment with Font Size and Color
style-textfragment-font-size-color.description: Demonstrates how to set the font size, text color, and font family for a TextFragment via its TextState and add the styled fragment to a PDF page.

add-text-to-pdf-using-memory-streams.title: Add Text to PDF Using Memory Streams
add-text-to-pdf-using-memory-streams.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream (or creating a new one), adding a text fragment to the first page, and saving the modified document back to a memory stream.

save-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Save PDF to Byte Array Using Aspose.Pdf
save-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally modify it, and save it into a MemoryStream to obtain a byte array for transmission or further processing.

add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.title: Add Text and Encrypt PDF with Password
add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a red "Confidential" text fragment to the first page, then encrypts the document with user and owner passwords and specific permissions before saving.

add-underlined-text-to-pdf.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
add-underlined-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a page, and insert an underlined text fragment by setting the TextState.Underline property and using TextBuilder.

create-strikethrough-text-pdf.title: Create Strikethrough Text in a PDF
create-strikethrough-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply a strikeout style to text by setting the TextState.StrikeOut property and adding a TextFragment to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

render-superscript-text.title: Render Superscript Text in PDF
render-superscript-text.description: Shows how to add normal and superscript text to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the TextState.Superscript flag and adjusting font size.

render-subscript-text-pdf.title: Render Subscript Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
render-subscript-text-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document and display subscript characters by setting the Subscript property (negative rise) on a TextFragment.

add-text-with-custom-line-spacing.title: Add Text with Custom Line Spacing to PDF
add-text-with-custom-line-spacing.description: Shows how to insert a paragraph into a PDF page and control the line spacing by setting the TextState's LineSpacing (leading) property using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a TextFragment to an existing PDF and change the spacing between words by setting TextState.WordSpacing.

create-justified-text-pdf.title: Create Justified Text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf
create-justified-text-pdf.description: Shows how to add a TextFragment to a PDF page, set its font, position, and apply HorizontalAlignment.Justify to produce justified text.

render-bidirectional-text-pdf.title: Render Bidirectional Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
render-bidirectional-text-pdf.description: Shows how to add a text fragment containing Arabic (right‑to‑left) and English (left‑to‑right) to a PDF, set the appropriate font and text state, and save the document.

set-custom-line-height-for-pdf-text.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
set-custom-line-height-for-pdf-text.description: Demonstrates how to adjust the line spacing (line height) of a text fragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.LineSpacing property.

simulate-kerning-using-character-spacing.title: Simulate Kerning Using CharacterSpacing in PDF TextFragment
simulate-kerning-using-character-spacing.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment and adjusts its CharacterSpacing to simulate kerning before appending it to the first page and saving the document.

add-text-with-automatic-ligatures-to-pdf.title: Add Text with Automatic Ligatures to PDF
add-text-with-automatic-ligatures-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a TextFragment, and rely on the font rendering engine to handle ligatures automatically.

enable-automatic-hyphenation-in-pdf.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation for PDF Text
enable-automatic-hyphenation-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to turn on automatic hyphenation for a TextFragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, including setting the hyphen symbol via reflection for version compatibility.

embed-css-in-htmlfragment.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for PDF Rendering
embed-css-in-htmlfragment.description: Shows how to embed CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, and spacing when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

create-text-link-goto-action.title: Create Text Link with GoTo Action in PDF
create-text-link-goto-action.description: Demonstrates adding a clickable text fragment to a PDF page that navigates to another page using a GoToAction annotation.

add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink Text to PDF
add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a text segment with a web hyperlink into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-clickable-text-launch-action.title: Create Clickable Text with Launch Action to Open a File
create-clickable-text-launch-action.description: Demonstrates adding a text fragment to a PDF and attaching a LaunchAction annotation so clicking the text opens an external file.

set-text-opacity-pdf.title: Set Text Opacity in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
set-text-opacity-pdf.description: Shows how to make text semi‑transparent by setting the alpha channel of the TextFragment's foreground color before appending it to a PDF page.

rotate-specific-text-fragment-pdf.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF
rotate-specific-text-fragment-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, finds a specified text fragment on the first page, rotates it 45 degrees, and saves the modified document.

insert-rotated-text-second-page.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
insert-rotated-text-second-page.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a rotated TextFragment, place it on the second page using TextBuilder, and save the modified document.

create-rotated-text-paragraph.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
create-rotated-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to build a TextParagraph, add several TextFragment lines, set its bounding rectangle, apply a 30‑degree rotation, and place it on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.title: Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in a PDF
replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.description: Shows how to locate and replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and TextSearchOptions.

extract-email-addresses-from-pdf.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages Using Regex
extract-email-addresses-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for email addresses using a regular expression with Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and collect the matches per page.

identify-line-breaks-in-pdf-text-fragmen.title: Identify and Process Line Breaks in PDF Text Fragments
identify-line-breaks-in-pdf-text-fragmen.description: Shows how to use ParagraphAbsorber to retrieve markup paragraphs, iterate through TextFragment lines, detect soft hyphen line breaks, and merge fragments for custom layout handling.

retrieve-line-break-info-from-pdf.title: Retrieve Line Break Information from PDF Text Fragments
retrieve-line-break-info-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract text fragments from a PDF, split them into logical lines, and log line‑break details along with the position of each text segment.

append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.title: Append Disclaimer Text to First PDF Page
append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a disclaimer as a TextFragment to the end of the first page's paragraph collection in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-header-text-fragments.title: Rotate Header Text Fragments in PDFs
rotate-header-text-fragments.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, extracts text fragments, treats large‑font fragments as headers, and rotates those fragments 90 degrees before saving the modified PDFs.

replace-text-rotate-pdf-page.title: Replace Text and Rotate PDF Page in Memory
replace-text-rotate-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, replacing specific text, rotating the first page, and saving the modified PDF back to a memory stream.

search-text-and-log-errors.title: Search Text in PDF and Log Extraction Errors
search-text-and-log-errors.description: Shows how to enable logging of text‑extraction errors while searching for a phrase in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and write the results to a log file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting all page text using TextAbsorber, and writing the concatenated result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-line-break-positions-pdf.title: Extract Line-Break Y Positions from PDF Text Fragments
extract-line-break-positions-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, extracts text fragments using Aspose.Pdf, determines distinct Y‑coordinates for each line within each fragment, and writes the line‑break positions to a JSON file.

add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated "CONFIDENTIAL" text fragment as a watermark on every page of a PDF document.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to replace a given phrase only within a defined page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

case-insensitive-keyword-highlighting.title: Case‑Insensitive Keyword Highlighting in PDF
case-insensitive-keyword-highlighting.description: Demonstrates how to search a PDF for a keyword without regard to case and highlight each occurrence using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and text state colors.

add-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragraph.title: Add Rotated Mixed-Style Text Paragraph to PDF Page
add-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates creating a TextParagraph with bold, italic, and regular lines, rotating it, and inserting it onto the third page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Files
batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF documents and replace multiple strings using a dictionary of old‑new pairs with Aspose.PDF.

extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the text from each page, counts the words, and writes the page number and word count to a CSV file.

rotate-draft-text-fragments.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
rotate-draft-text-fragments.description: Shows how to find every occurrence of the word "Draft" in a PDF and apply a 15‑degree rotation to those text fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.title: Find MM/DD/YYYY Dates in PDF Using Regex
find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.description: Loads a PDF document and uses a regular‑expression based TextFragmentAbsorber to locate all dates in the MM/DD/YYYY format, printing each match with its page number and saving the unchanged PDF.

append-multi-line-textfragment-get-line-.title: Append Multi‑Line TextFragment and Retrieve Line‑Break Positions
append-multi-line-textfragment-get-line-.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line TextFragment to a PDF page and extract each line’s baseline Y coordinate via TextSegment information for custom rendering.

rotate-table-cell-text-60-degrees.title: Rotate Table Cell Text by 60 Degrees
rotate-table-cell-text-60-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table cell in a PDF, rotate each text fragment inside the cell by 60 degrees using TextFragment.Rotation, and save the updated document.

rotate-pdf-title-text-45-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
rotate-pdf-title-text-45-degrees.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to rotate the title text (page content) of PDF files by 45 degrees and save the resulting documents.

add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.title: Add Rotated Text to Bottom-Right Corner of Last PDF Page
add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated text paragraph at the bottom-right corner of the last page of a PDF.

search-replace-text-with-hyperlink.title: Search and Replace Text with Clickable Hyperlink in PDF
search-replace-text-with-hyperlink.description: Shows how to find a phrase in a PDF, replace it with new text, and attach a clickable URL link using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-text-sentences-pages.title: Extract PDF Text and Save Each Sentence on a Separate Page
extract-pdf-text-sentences-pages.description: The example extracts all text from a source PDF, splits it into individual sentences, and creates a new PDF where each sentence is placed on its own page as a TextFragment.

rotate-pdf-form-field-text.title: Rotate PDF Form Field Text via Appearance Stream
rotate-pdf-form-field-text.description: Shows how to rotate the text inside a PDF textbox form field by accessing its appearance stream and setting a transformation matrix with Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-text-pdf-config.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Using a Configuration File
batch-replace-text-pdf-config.description: Demonstrates how to load old‑new string pairs from a simple key=value file and replace all occurrences of each keyword across every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fuzzy-text-search-pdf.title: Fuzzy Text Search in PDF using Regex
fuzzy-text-search-pdf.description: Shows how to locate approximate matches of a phrase in a PDF by applying a regular‑expression pattern with TextFragmentAbsorber and TextSearchOptions.
